findings.issue: Both 'システム方式設計' and 'ソフトウェア方式設計' render as 'System/Software Architecture Design' in en, which collapses the JP textbook's deliberate '方式設計' (method-design) terminology and may confuse readers; the definitions reference each other but the EN labels lose the parallel structure.
findings.recommended_fix: Either keep both as 'System/Software Architecture Design' (current) and add a translator's note, or render as 'System Method Design / Software Method Design' to preserve the JP textbook distinction. Non-blocking.

findings.jp: ソフトウェア方式設計
findings.issue: Same as above — parallel JP '方式設計' label loses its structural cue in en.

findings.jp: システム設計のプロセスの1つ。システムに関係するプロセスで、ソフトウェア方式設計とはまったく別のプロセス。
findings.zh: 系统设计的过程之一。是与系统相关的过程，与软件方式设计完全不同。
findings.en: One of the system design processes. A process related to the system itself, completely separate from software architecture design.
findings.issue: Addition of 'itself' is a minor gloss not in JP; otherwise faithful.
